steps.title: Find the retail price
steps.content:
The retail price is $290\%$ of the wholesale price, so multiply by $2.90$.
$$8.00\cdot2.90=23.20$$

steps.title: Apply the discount
steps.content:
A $70\%$ discount means the remaining price is $30\%$ of the retail price.
$$0.30\cdot23.20=6.96$$
The answer is 6.96.
